title: Geon Definition

title: Pareto Chart Definition

Relevance criteria: documents must explain the chart’s purpose in identifying the most significant factors (the "80‑20 rule"), describe how to construct and interpret it, and provide examples from data analysis contexts (e.g., defects, causes, or outcome frequencies). Non‑financial interpretations or unrelated uses of the word "Pareto" are excluded.
